LanguageData.AutoDrill.label: auto drill
LanguageData.AutoDrill.description:
An old-generation deep-crust auto drill designed for long-term unmanned operation. It can switch between external power and solar power, and offers high-speed, high-precision, and safe drilling modes. It continuously mines underground veins based on ground-penetrating scanner results and ejects processed ore directly. When local deep resources are exhausted, it automatically powers down. Can be repositioned freely.
created/edited by easyrim
